title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: WALLACE ROCKWOOD MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical services including basic health care (checkups, physical exams, vaccines, STI screening and treatment, and blood pressure screenings), pediatric care (well baby and child visits, and immunizations), women's health (checkups, breast and cervical cancer screenings, pregnancy testing, and birth control), mental health evaluations, and same-day sick appointments. 18633 SE Stark Street Suite 401 Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Low-income, insured and uninsured adults and children Insurance accepted: CareOregon, Family Care, Oregon Health Plan (OHP Open Card), Healthy Kids, Lifewise, Moda Health, United Healthcare Medicare, Providence Medicare and Private, and PacificSource Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:45am-6pm, Friday 7:45am-5pm Email (503) 489-1760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 489-1760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: -$25 minimum fee -Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance -Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance -No one turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable, if not applicable, 1 month of income information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1 block north of the MAX Line at SE 181st Avenue stop Services: Breast Examinations Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Pap Tests Vaccine Information Well Baby Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLACE ROCKWOOD MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC
